title: Kharg Island, Iran's key oil export hub
subhed: Tehran threatened to 'destroy and turn into a pile of ashes' US energy and oil infrastructure in the region after US strikes on the key island on Friday.

title: Explosion damages Jewish school in Amsterdam, no injuries
subhed: The blast occurred in the early hours of Saturday morning and comes after nighttime attacks this week in front of synagogues in the Belgian city of Liege and the Dutch port city of Rotterdam.

title: Six Nations: Between the Lions tour and Les Bleus' unexpected downfall, a dramatic finale looms
subhed: Every four years, England, Scotland, Ireland and Wales must contend with players worn out by the British and Irish Lions tour. But Scotland and Ireland are still in with a chance to win the Six Nations ahead of the final matchday on Saturday.

title: France returns to the Central African Republic 'after a period of cooling off'
subhed: France's foreign minister met with Central African President Faustin-Archange Touadéra on Friday, March 13. The visit signals Paris' intention to reassert its presence in a country that has turned toward Moscow.

title: How a billiard hall in Paris's Belleville neighborhood became a symbol of gentrification
subhed: Every evening, a new crowd of young creatives packs M8, a billiards hall with six tables located in Paris's 19th arrondissement. As those working in the luxury industry started coming, the venue's original regulars gradually faded away.

title: Luxury-loving Belgian cocaine kingpin 'Finger Cutter' to face justice
subhed: Considered by the authorities in his country to be one of the most important cocaine traffickers in Europe, Flor Bressers, a Belgian with an atypical profile, fond of luxury and architect of sprawling networks, is at the center of a legal saga.

title: Benjamin Netanyahu, a prime minister without checks and balances
subhed: The strikes in Iran have further reduced the political space for opposition in Israel, even as concerns mount over a possible ground offensive in Lebanon. Today, only Donald Trump seems capable of influencing the Israeli leader.
